scene_title: Cavalo de fogo em pintura medieval
narrative_beat: Cavalo com pelagem de chamas reais

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a medium lateral shot of a medieval painted war horse with coat made of real living flames, steam venting from nostrils, mane of flying sparks
subject.focal_point: the burning coat textured with real fire licks
subject.secondary: A darkened armored rider astride; background plain empty desaturated; embers swirl

composition.rule: rule of thirds on horse head
composition.foreground: horse and flames in vivid crimson-gold

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber saturation, anamorphic flare

symbolism.primary: horse not of parade red but of war-fire
symbolism.secondary: flame-coat as divine red of judgment

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
